description: Fair cross-lab comparison scenario with fixed duration and payload size.

comparison_profile.objective: Compare service decomposition overhead against the secure monolith or mesh.

workload_model.payload_shape: Same fixed-size benchmark payload as earlier labs.
workload_model.concurrency_model: Deterministic virtual users with one message every 1000 ms in the comparison run.

metrics_contract.latency: Client-observed end-to-end latency across gateway and backend services.
metrics_contract.error_rate: Dropped messages plus DB errors divided by total processed messages.
metrics_contract.db_latency: Database query latency when message and history services persist data.

traceability.contract: trace_id and message_id propagate through gateway, message service, history service, and storage.
traceability.propagation: Client -> gateway -> message service -> database -> gateway/history service.

consistency_model.target: Service-coordinated durability with eventual multi-service visibility
consistency_model.notes: The write path is durable, but reads and fan-out now cross service boundaries with explicit trace propagation.

failure_model.focus: Inter-service latency, partial outages, and dependency amplification.

routing_strategy.policy: Gateway-mediated routing with service-specific downstream ownership.
routing_strategy.objective: Make routing decisions explicit as the system decomposes into independently scalable services.

observability.baseline: Prometheus metrics plus trace IDs propagated through HTTP headers and messages.
observability.logging: Trace IDs support end-to-end message follow-through across services.

cost_model.dominant_axis: Service-to-service hops, duplicated runtime overhead, and operational complexity.
cost_model.notes: Microservices add coordination and platform cost beyond raw compute.

synthesis.scaling_inflection: The architecture becomes operationally composable, but routing, tracing, and cost must be managed as first-class concerns.
synthesis.learning_goal: End the curriculum with a measurable synthesis of decomposition trade-offs.
